chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 444 of 2019 SCRA 445 of 2019 SCRA 447 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 2. For orders on CMA No.2498/2019. 05.05.2026 Mr. M. Rashid Arfi, advocate for the applicant.. Per learned counsel the only question proposed for determination is squarely covered against the applicant by virtue of judgment reported as 2025 SCMR 969. In view hereof, reference applications are dismissed. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in the connected files. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
